title: Umami Delight One-Pot with Dill Pickle and Dumplings
description: A low-fat-friendly Moroccan-inspired one-pot dish featuring umami flavors from soy sauce and dark miso, complemented by the sharpness of dill pickles and the flaky texture of dumplings.
instructions: Heat the broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add soy sauce and miso, stirring until fully dissolved.
Add carrots and dill pickles; stir to combine.
Gently drop dumplings into the soup, making sure not to overcrowd the pot.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 10 minutes or until dumplings are cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Squeeze in lemon juice, add lemon zest at last and stir well.
